name: io.github.koki-socialgist/decixa-mcp
description: Decixa MCP Server — intent-driven API discovery and selection for AI agents.

tools.name: resolve
tools.description: Find the best API for a task using natural language. Returns top recommendation + alternatives, ranked by Phase 3 vector + scoring.

tools.name: discover
tools.description: List APIs ranked by intent. Returns multiple candidates so the agent can choose. Verified-x402 only.

tools.name: search_apis
tools.description: DEPRECATED alias for resolve. Will be removed in v1.0.0.

tools.name: browse_apis
tools.description: DEPRECATED alias for discover. Will be removed in v1.0.0.

tools.name: get_api_detail
tools.description: Get full details for a specific API including pricing, endpoints, trust_evidence signals, and verified_live flag.

tools.name: get_index
tools.description: Get the machine-readable Decixa agent index — endpoints, total API count, and usage guidance.
